traces
| where timestamp between (datetime(2026-05-18 05:47:30) .. datetime(2026-05-18 05:49:00))
| where message contains "notification"
   or message contains "email"
   or message contains "configuration"
   or message contains "queue"
   or message contains "recipient"
   or message contains "tpc"
   or message contains "Dataverse"
| project timestamp, severityLevel, message, operation_Name, operation_Id
| order by timestamp asc
